accounts.name: Salary
accounts.description: Wages paid to employees, including the owner if on payroll.

accounts.name: Salary withholding tax
accounts.description: Forskuddstrekk paid to Skatteetaten on behalf of employees.

accounts.name: Employer's contribution
accounts.description: Arbeidsgiveravgift paid to Skatteetaten.

accounts.name: VAT payment
accounts.description: Merverdiavgift (MVA) paid to or refunded from Skatteetaten.

accounts.name: Office rent
accounts.description: Rent for office or workspace.

accounts.name: Utilities
accounts.description: Electricity, internet, mobile, water.

accounts.name: Software & SaaS
accounts.description: Subscriptions to software tools (e.g. Figma, Slack, AWS, GitHub).

accounts.name: Hardware & equipment
accounts.description: Computers, monitors, phones, office equipment.

accounts.name: Travel & lodging
accounts.description: Flights, trains, hotels, taxis on business trips.

accounts.name: Meals & entertainment
accounts.description: Client dinners, team lunches, coffee meetings.

accounts.name: Office supplies
accounts.description: Stationery, pens, printer ink, kitchen supplies.

accounts.name: Marketing & advertising
accounts.description: Ads, sponsorships, promotional materials, events.

accounts.name: Professional services
accounts.description: Lawyers, accountants, consultants, freelancers (with invoice).

accounts.name: Bank fees & interest
accounts.description: Account fees, card fees, interest charges.

accounts.name: Insurance
accounts.description: Business insurance premiums.

accounts.name: Supplier invoice (uncategorized)
accounts.description: Generic supplier payment — use when the supplier is known but category isn't clear yet.

accounts.name: Customer payment received
accounts.description: Incoming payment from a customer for an invoice.

accounts.name: Owner draw / capital
accounts.description: Money moved between the business and the owner personally (not salary).

accounts.name: Loan / financing
accounts.description: Loan disbursement or repayment, including credit lines.

accounts.name: Internal transfer
accounts.description: Money moved between the business's own accounts. Not income or expense.

accounts.name: Personal expense (to flag)
accounts.description: Looks personal, not business. Use only if you're confident.

accounts.name: Uncertain
accounts.description: You couldn't confidently assign a category. Always pair with owner-question triage.
